title: Risk Factors - Demand and Supply
text: Revenue and margin could be materially affected by demand volatility, supply constraints, product transitions, and competition in accelerated computing markets.

title: Liquidity and Capital Resources
text: Strong cash balances and operating cash flow may mitigate liquidity risk, but working capital needs could rise with supply commitments.

title: Business Overview
text: The business depends on data center demand, gaming demand, software ecosystem adoption, manufacturing partners, and customer purchasing cycles.
